items.name_en: B's latest bucket bag, made of cotton twill. Crafted in an Italian workshop, adorned with jacquard B's exclusive check pattern. Unlined design, lightweight. Features smooth calfskin trim and an adjustable shoulder strap, allowing you to switch between shoulder and crossbody styles. A must-have style. 17.5 x 10.5 x 20cm

items.name_en: The bucket bag is a signature style for many fashion bloggers, suitable for both commuting and casual wear. Canvas material is structured and durable, creating a more three-dimensional silhouette when worn. It offers ample capacity and an adjustable shoulder strap! Plus, it's very lightweight. As a new member of this series, it's bound to captivate many bag lovers!

items.name_en: Wow wow wow wow wow 👍 Super many compartments, new plaid military backpack is here ✌🏻 With B-shaped zipper pullers, two tightening pockets on the sides for water bottles ✔️ The bag has 4 external pockets 😘 and 2 internal compartments ❤ Wow... holding the textbooks of students, mainly can be sorted and stored separately 👍 convenient 👍 files or laptops, all accommodated 👍 The handle is also designed very well, it doesn't hurt the hand no matter how heavy it is, the handle is padded with comfortable, elegant foam

items.name_en: ❤【Ostrich Brown】
items.name_cn:
❤【Ostrich Brown】
Loro Piana Extra pocket L19 Series Bestseller
A life without definition is the most comfortable, just like Loro Piana's material and design. Styles without complex designs, with simple and soft contours that are elegant and timeless, like a exquisite makeup case, perfectly balancing aesthetics and functionality. The leather is fine, feeling as soft as butter. The compact body has a large capacity. It can be carried by hand with a thin strap or crossbody. Sisters who love minimalist style can get this one. Simple and versatile, the simpler, the more unique. Celebrities and influencers are raving about it. It's hard not to love it with such rare leather.
Size: Small: 19×7×12cm

items.name_en: ❤️B Brand Pure Original Pocket Bag, Cowhide with Canvas, Caramel Coffee + Cream White colorway, retro and high-end yet durable. It has a bit of a cute academic vibe and a strong British tone. Can be sweet or salty, looks great handheld or crossbody! Handheld gives a better street snap vibe, the more you look, the more you like it. Large: 37×9.5×41cm
